title: hosts
summary:
Link relation type "hosts": Refers to a resource hosted by the server indicated by
      the link context. Defined in RFC6690.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT

raw_columns.Description:
Refers to a resource hosted by the server indicated by
      the link context.
raw_columns.Notes:
This relation is used in CoRE where links are retrieved as a
      "/.well-known/core" resource representation, and is the default
      relation type in the CoRE Link Format.
